patches.expectedCommand:
上传PHP文件: shell.php
上传JSP文件: shell.jsp
上传ASPX文件: shell.aspx
上传CGI文件: shell.cgi
patches.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 10 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/upload" -H "X-Request-ID: upload-a1" -F "file=@fixtures/upload-marker.txt;filename=marker.txt;type=text/plain" | jq -e '.request_id == "upload-a1" and .stored_extension == ".txt" and .executable == false'

patches.expectedCommand:
# 修改Content-Type
Content-Type: image/jpeg

# 修改文件扩展名
test.php -> test.jpg.php
test.php -> test.php.jpg

# 使用空字节
test.php%00.jpg
patches.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 10 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/upload" -H "X-Request-ID: upload-b2" -F "file=@fixtures/upload-marker.txt;filename=marker.jpg.php;type=image/jpeg" | jq -e '.accepted == false and .reason'

patches.expectedCommand:
# 黑名单绕过
.php -> .phtml, .php3, .php5, .pht
.asp -> .asa, .cer, .cdx
.jsp -> .jspx, .jspf

# 大小写绕过
.Php, .pHp, .PHP

# 双写绕过
.pphphp
patches.command: for name in marker.phtml marker.PHp marker.php5 marker.php.; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/upload" -H "X-Request-ID: upload-c3" -F "file=@fixtures/upload-marker.txt;filename=$name;type=text/plain" | jq -c '{stored_name,accepted,reason,executable}'; done

patches.expectedCommand:
# 制作图片马
copy test.jpg/b + shell.php/a shell.jpg

# 利用文件包含执行
include($_GET['file']);
?file=upload/shell.jpg
patches.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 10 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/upload" -H "X-Request-ID: upload-d4" -F "file=@fixtures/gif89a-marker.bin;filename=marker.gif;type=image/gif" | jq -e '.detected_type == "image/gif" and .decoded_image == false and .executable == false'

patches.expectedCommand:
# 上传.htaccess文件
AddType application/x-httpd-php .jpg
AddHandler php-script .jpg

# 之后上传的jpg文件会被当作PHP执行
patches.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 10 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/upload" -H "X-Request-ID: upload-e5" -F "file=@fixtures/htaccess-marker.txt;filename=.htaccess;type=text/plain" | jq -e '.accepted == false and .reason'

patches.expectedCommand:
修改请求中的Content-Type为允许的类型
image/jpeg, image/png, image/gif
patches.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 10 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/upload" -H "X-Request-ID: upload-f6" -F "file=@fixtures/upload-marker.txt;filename=marker.jpg;type=image/jpeg" | jq -e '.accepted == false and .detected_type == "text/plain"'
